Page 627. Vol III. 1882
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,

Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Cheadle於大約1310年出生在英國爾黑阿德爾時，她的父親Roger Dutton de Cheadle31歲，母親Matilda de Massey31歲。她於大約1327年與Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle在英國爾布爾可勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1347年在英國爾享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Cheadle于大约1310年出生在英国爾黑阿德爾时，她的父亲Roger Dutton de Cheadle31岁，母亲Matilda de Massey31岁。她于大约1327年与Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle在英国爾布爾可勒结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1347年在英国爾享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheadle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): habitational name from any of the places in Cheshire and Staffordshire named Cheadle, from Celtic cēd ‘wood’ + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Cheadle was born about 1310, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, her father, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, was 31 and her mother, Matilda de Massey, was 31. She married Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle about 1327, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1347, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Cheadle est née environ 1310, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Massey, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle environ 1327, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1347, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Cheadle um 1310 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Dutton de Cheadle 31 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Massey 31. Sie hat um 1327 in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1347 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Cheadle è nata il circa 1310 nel Cheadle, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Massey, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle circa 1327, nel Bulkeley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1347, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Cheadleが約1310年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルで生まれた時，父Roger Dutton de Cheadleは31歳，母Matilda de Masseyは31歳であった。約1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーでRichard Bulkeley of Cheadleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1347年にイギリスチェシュアイアで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Cheadle(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 체실르 체아들일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Dutton de Cheadle(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Massey(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1327년 영국 체실르 버켈리에서 Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1347년 영국 체실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Cheadle nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Massey, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle aproximadamente 1327, em Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1347, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Cheadle родилась около 1310 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Dutton de Cheadle было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Massey, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle около 1327 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1347 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Cheadle nació aproximadamente 1310, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Matilda de Massey, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle aproximadamente 1327, en Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1347, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
